block_00: Billing Error: Your payment was declined
block_01: It looks like we can’t process your payment. There are different reasons for billing errors. Below are the most common:
block_02: Insufficient funds on your bank account. Check if you correctly calculated the USD amount in your currency. We recommend having a little more money in your account than you need just in case.
block_03: Unauthorized transaction. Contact your bank to find out if 3D secure transactions are enabled.
block_04: The payment details were incorrect. See if you entered the payment details correctly.
block_05: The time of the payment has expired. Retry the payment and enter the 3D code in a timely manner.
block_06: The payment was declined by the bank. Contact your bank to learn the reason and fix it.
block_07: Your bank account has internal limits for operations. Please, use another method or contact your bank.
block_11: If you work from China, you might be experiencing a firewall issue. Try again or use Alipay.
block_12: Check and see if your bank account and payment details are in order or try another payment method.
block_14: If you have any questions, you can contact us at support@iqoption.com.
